description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Lotus Domino iNotes Client 6.5.4 and 7.0 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) an email subject; (2) an encoded javascript URI, as demonstrated using "javascript:"; or (3) when the Domino Web Access ActiveX control is not installed, via an email attachment filename.
